title: Forces and equilibrium
summary: 9709 Mechanics — resolving forces, equilibrium, friction, and free-body diagrams with PhET forces sim.
learningObjectives: Represent forces as vectors and resolve components.
Use F ≤ μR for limiting friction.

simpleExplanation.title: Forces in balance
simpleExplanation.summary: Equilibrium means no net force and no net moment. Resolve along and perpendicular to slopes — weight mg always acts vertically.
steps: Components: F cos θ along plane, F sin θ perpendicular.
Limiting friction F = μR when about to slip.
Normal reaction R ⊥ to surface, not always equal to mg.

sections.content: **Forces and equilibrium** (4.1) precedes **Newton's laws** (4.4) and **energy** (4.5). A clear **FBD** often earns the first 2 marks.
